log_01.title: Site Entry Log
log_01.transcript: Field team alpha, you are cleared for embryo recovery. First target: Brachiosaurus specimen at site entry.

log_02.title: Horned Predator
log_02.transcript: Brachiosaurus secured. Ceratosaurus signature located in Sector B — maintain distance.

log_03.title: River Threat
log_03.transcript: Ceratosaurus recovered. Spinosaurus signature in river basin. Avoid water crossings.

log_04.title: Ridge Tracker
log_04.transcript: Spinosaurus contained. Carcharodontosaurus movement on eastern ridge. Maintain distance.

log_05.title: Apex Warning
log_05.transcript: Carcharodontosaurus secured. Tyrannosaurus bio-signature escalating. Do not engage.

log_06.title: Hybrid Alert
log_06.transcript: Tyrannosaurus recovered. Scorpios Rex hybrid strain detected. Full containment protocol.

log_07.title: Bull Charge
log_07.transcript: Scorpios Rex stabilized. Carnotaurus designate Toro near southern fence. Stay mobile.

log_08.title: Giant Sweep
log_08.transcript: Toro secured. Giganotosaurus tracking active. Largest predator in sector.

log_09.title: Raptor Activity
log_09.transcript: Giganotosaurus recovered. Velociraptor pack signatures increasing. Do not split up.

log_10.title: Final Recovery
log_10.transcript: Velociraptor pack contained. Mutadon specimen at extraction point. Complete recovery.

alarm.title: System Alarm
alarm.transcript: ALERT: Perimeter breach detected. All personnel report to secure zones.
